title: Randomized Suspicious Stews
description: Suspicious stews are randomized for every worlds.
body:
## Randomized Suspicious Stews

This mod randomizes the effects given by flowers when crafting Suspicious Stews. Instead of the vanilla behavior where each flower always produces the same effect, every world generates its own unique flower-to-effect table.

When a new world is created, all flowers are randomly assigned to different Suspicious Stew effects. This means that in each world, players must experiment and discover which flowers produce which effects.

### Features:

- Per-world randomization: Every world has its own randomized flower/effect table for Suspicious Stews.
- Guaranteed effect coverage: Every possible Suspicious Stew effect is guaranteed to be assigned to at least one flower.
- Multiple flowers per effect: Some effects may be linked to several flowers, encouraging experimentation.
- Consistent Wither rule: The Wither Rose always produces the Suspicious Stew that grants the Wither effect, and no other flower can give this effect.
- Brown Mooshroom compatibility: Feeding a flower to a Brown Mooshroom will store the effect that flower would produce in a Suspicious Stew, so the stew obtained by milking it matches the randomized effect table.
- Tall flower support: New crafting recipes have been added so tall flowers can also be used to craft Suspicious Stews.

Experiment, take notes, and rediscover Suspicious Stews in every new world!
